stemHtml: For an aeroplane with one fixed value of V<sub>A</sub> the following applies. V<sub>A</sub> is:

options.a: the speed at which unrestricted application of full control surface deflection can be made, without exceeding the maximum manoeuvring limit load factor.
options.b: the maximum speed in smooth air.
options.c: just another symbol for the rough air speed.
options.d: the speed at which the aeroplane stalls at the manoeuvring limit load factor at MTOW.
